baselineRefRationale: The immutable v1.3.0 release tag, NEVER git HEAD. A HEAD baseline only equals the pre-upgrade tree while the upgrade is uncommitted; once committed it would compare the upgrade against itself and pass forever, silently killing the charter #2 default-parity proof.
defaultPolicy: Every upgrade environment input is inactive when absent. baselineEnvReads registers v1.3.0 inputs without reclassifying their legacy defaults.

flags.name: FABLE_BUDGET_CONFIG
flags.purpose: Inline retry-budget override; absent uses the bounded built-in defaults.

flags.name: FABLE_BUDGET_CONFIG_FILE
flags.purpose: Retry-budget override file; absent performs no config-file read.

flags.name: FABLE_CLAUDE_BIN
flags.purpose: Evaluation-only Claude executable override; absent uses the runner default.

flags.name: FABLE_MEASURE
flags.purpose: Primary measurement and holdout activation gate.

flags.name: FABLE_MEASURE_CAMPAIGN
flags.purpose: Measurement campaign label; inert unless FABLE_MEASURE is enabled.

flags.name: FABLE_MEASURE_HOME
flags.purpose: Measurement state directory override; inert unless FABLE_MEASURE is enabled.

flags.name: FABLE_MEASURE_OFF_PCT
flags.purpose: Measurement holdout percentage override; inert unless FABLE_MEASURE is enabled.

flags.name: FABLE_MEASURE_TEXT_SIGNALS
flags.purpose: Measurement text-signal collection toggle; inert unless FABLE_MEASURE is enabled.

flags.name: FABLE_OPUS_BASELINE_ATTESTED
flags.purpose: Evaluation-only prerequisite attestation; absent blocks the real Opus arm.

flags.name: FABLE_OPUS_BUDGET_CONFIRMED
flags.purpose: Evaluation-only spend confirmation; absent blocks the real Opus arm.

flags.name: FABLE_OPUS_MODEL
flags.purpose: Evaluation-only model override; absent uses the preregistered runner default.

flags.name: FABLE_ORCHESTRATION_PREFLIGHT
flags.purpose: Installer selector for the upgraded orchestrate skill preflight guidance.

flags.name: FABLE_READONLY_VERIFIER
flags.purpose: Installer gate for the read-only verifier agent and its scoped tool gate. ALSO selects the upgraded orchestrate skill overlay (install.mjs: DO_ORCHESTRATION_PREFLIGHT || DO_READONLY_AGENT) and, like every upgrade flag, skips the opt-in runtime prune — so the guidance and the modules it orders are installed together.

flags.name: FABLE_TASK_CRITERIA
flags.purpose: Opt-in fable-plan guidance plus MCP fable_check task-criteria schema, parsing, and surfacing.

flags.name: FABLE_ULTRA
flags.purpose: Existing mode input reused by the inert, explicitly called auto-tier routing API; unset preserves the v1.3.0 auto resolver.

flags.name: FABLE_VERIFIER_HOOK_EXEMPTION
flags.purpose: Subagent restraint-payload exemption gate for the registered read-only verifier role.
